highlights.headline: Boston Celtics vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Boston Celtics vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Boston Celtics vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/04/24 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jayson Tatum continued to shine in his return from injury with 25 points and Jaylen Brown also scored 25 to help the Boston Celtics beat the Philadelphia 76ers 108-100 on Friday night and take a 2-1 lead in the Eastern Conference first-round series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtics beat the 76ers 108-100 in Game 3 behind 25 points each from Tatum and Brown

video.headline: Boston Celtics vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Boston Celtics vs. Philadelphia 76ers: Game Highlights) 2026/04/24 ESHEET

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Houston Rockets

highlights.headline: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights) 2026/04/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — LeBron James scored 29 points, including a tying 3-pointer with 13 seconds left in regulation, Marcus Smart had eight points in overtime and the Los Angeles Lakers took advantage of a Houston Rockets team missing Kevin Durant for a 112-108 win...
headlines.shortLinkText: James makes tying 3 as Lakers storm back late, win in OT and take a 3-0 series lead over the Rockets

video.headline: Los Angeles Lakers vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Los Angeles Lakers vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights) 2026/04/25 ESHEET

events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Portland Trail Blazers

highlights.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. Portland Trail Blazers: Game Highlights) 2026/04/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Stephon Castle had 33 points and the San Antonio Spurs overcame the absence of Victor Wembanyama to beat the Portland Trail Blazers 120-108 on Friday night for a 2-1 series lead.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs beat Trail Blazers 120-108 without Wembanyama to take 2-1 series lead
